data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Minimizes decision-making time by simplifying interface complexity.
data.technical_spec: Limits the number of choices displayed simultaneously.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Design prioritizes the ease of interactive elements.
data.technical_spec: Incorporates adequately sized and spaced clickable elements.

data.title: Gestalt Principles
data.description: Ensures user-friendly grouping of visual elements.
data.technical_spec: Uses proximity, similarity, and common region techniques.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Adheres to cognitive limits by optimizing information chunks.
data.technical_spec: Presents information in bite-sized portions or groupings.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Balances visual appeal with functional usability.
data.technical_spec: Employs a cohesive visual design with intuitive navigation.
